action.reasoning: Observation: Iter4 train.py failed with conv2d 5D input error, likely due to mishandling variable neighbor counts in batch processing. Currently zero reward because dense reward missing earlier; also shape bug. Analysis: Need to fix shape handling: store states without extra batch dim, use per-sample forward in training loop. Also incorporate node utility as additional feature for better learning signal. Decision: Rewrite model.py (add utility input), utils.py (include utility for neighbors), train.py (robust DQN with per-sample updates), predict.py (load model correctly). Run quick 100-episode training to validate pipeline, then submit eval.
